title: lacistemataceae
intro: The lacistemataceae rank is a family of plants, which is a taxonomic grouping of related genera within a specific order of plants. A family in plant taxonomy typically comprises a group of related genera that share similar characteristics, and is often used to classify plants based on their morphology, anatomy, and evolutionary relationships. Families are typically ranked below orders and above genera in the taxonomic hierarchy. The lacistemataceae family would include a group of plant species that share a common set of characteristics and evolutionary history.
